channel.title: vlog on lcycug
channel.description: Recent content in vlog on lcycug

item.title: 2020 Flags
item.description: It is a good practice to set goals at the beginning of a new year. Goals lead us to a better end usually. I read a story in 2019 saying the best way to learn something is to convey to others. So in the new year of 2020, I wanna be a person to share with others both knowledge and life. At the mention of sharing, the vlog might be the most popular way on the earth that transfers more realistic stuff than words.
